case_title: DIANA JOHNSON ET AL VS. STEVE MONTELONGO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $84.97) SERVED JUN-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTELONGO, STEVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, DIANA BENOIT, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTELONGO, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DIANA BENOIT, MICHELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTELONGO, STEVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS DIANA JOHNSON AND MICHELLE BENOIT ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVE MONTELONGO IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
